base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ganon_phase_walk — a character (final_boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Ganon — boar-beast final boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ganon — boar-beast final boss; 4-frame walk cycle. Invisible until hit by Silver Arrow (must be hit with sword first to briefly reveal, then Silver Arrow in eye). Boss of Level 9 inner chamber
